title: E'thinaa
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=E'thinaa |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] **[[Praetorite Vong]]''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' |domain= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The only thing you shall get from me is death.|E'thinaa, to Molierre Cundertol|}} '''E'thinaa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Operative|agent]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was active in the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]], the government of the [[Ssi-ruu]] [[Species/Legends|species]], disguised as a Ssi-ruu. He attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[General/Legends|general]] and helped manipulate the Ssi-ruuk for the benefit of the Yuuzhan Vong. He also helped to arrange for the Ssi-ruuk to [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|attack]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], weakening both the Ssi-ruuk and the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] government, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. He dealt with [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] [[Molierre Cundertol]] of Bakura and [[Death/Legends|killed]] him after the Ssi-ruuk were repelled. ==Biography== {{Quote|You have your new body. What more do you want?''"
"''You know what I want. You said you'd refund half the money I paid for this body if I delivered you Bakura. I've done that, so now I'd like what you promised me.|E'thinaa and Molierre Cundertol|}} The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] known as E'thinaa was an [[operative]] of the [[Praetorite Vong]], an advance force of Yuuzhan Vong designed to create chaos in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in preparation for the [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]]. Though the Praetorite Vong suffered a [[Battle of Helska IV|serious military defeat]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] at [[Helska IV]],''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' E'thinaa continued to work to soften potential enemies. By [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], he held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]], the government of the war-like [[Ssi-ruu]]k. Carefully disguised in an [[ooglith masquer]], E'thinaa helped engineer the rise of the [[Keeramak]], a Ssi-ruu of prophecy. The Yuuzhan Vong hoped to create a conflict between the Ssi-ruuk and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], knowing that such a war would weaken both sides. He also made a deal with [[Molierre Cundertol]], [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Keeping his true origins secret, he promised to supply Cundertol with a new [[Droid/Legends|droid]] body—enabling him to live forever—if the Prime Minister would surrender Bakura. E'thinaa also agreed to provide him with half the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] Cundertol had paid for the droid body. The Yuuzhan Vong then enabled him to transfer his essence into the [[Human replica droid|droid]] through a Ssi-ruuk process known as [[entechment]]. The process went as planned, and soon after, the Ssi-ruuk launched an [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|attack]] on Bakura. As E'thinaa had expected, the Keeramak was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. The Ssi-ruuk were forced to flee, and Cundertol, now in a droid body, met up with E'thinaa in a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] at the edge of Ssi-ruu [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. There, E'thinaa chastised Cundertol for wanting to know why the General wanted the Keeramak dead and refused to pay the man the money he had promised him, claiming that Cundertol had not fulfilled the bargain. When an irate Cundertol protested, E'thinaa offered the former Prime Minister the chance to fight for it. Cundertol accepted, only to have E'thinaa activate a [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]] that froze Cundertol's droid body. The General then revealed his true origins to his horror-stricken foe. Other Yuuzhan Vong flooded into the room and began beating Cundertol with [[amphistaff]]s until he died. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You are nothing to me. Perhaps, had you remained alive, we might have taken you as a slave or a sacrifice; but as you are, you are worthless, unliving filth.|E'thinaa, to Molierre Cundertol|}} E'thinaa served his species, working to weaken potential foes and enable the Yuuzhan Vong's conquest of the galaxy. He kept his true identity a secret and manipulated Molierre Cundertol into surrendering Bakura. When Cundertol protested that he was being treated unfairly, E'thinaa mocked him, and was amused when the man agreed to fight him. Like all his people, E'thinaa considered [[Human/Legends|Humans]] to be a lesser species and their droids to be abominations. He felt that Cundertol, in a droid body, was unworthy of [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] or an honorable death in a sacrifice. ==Behind the scenes== The Yuuzhan Vong E'thinaa was created for the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=E'thinaa }} [[Category:Admirals and generals]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong]]
